tools.name: allFunctions.getGetColoredPathway
tools.description: getColoredPathwayGet a colored image version of the pathway.

tools.name: allFunctions.getGetCurationTags
tools.description: getCurationTagsGet all curation tags for the given tag name. Use this method if you want to find all pathways that are tagged with a specific curation tag.

tools.name: allFunctions.getGetCurationTagsByName
tools.description: getCurationTagsByNameGet all curation tags for the given tag name. Use this method if you want to find all pathways that are tagged with a specific curation tag.

tools.name: allFunctions.getRemoveCurationTag
tools.description: removeCurationTagRemove a curation tag from a pathway.

tools.name: allFunctions.postCreatePathway
tools.description:
createPathwayCreate a new pathway on the wiki with the given GPML code.
Note: To create/modify pathways via the web service, you need to have an account with web service write permissions. Please contact us to request write access for the web service.

tools.name: download.getGetPathwayAs
tools.description: getPathwayAsDownload a pathway in the specified file format.

tools.name: history.getGetPathwayHistory
tools.description: getPathwayHistoryGet the revision history of a pathway.

tools.name: history.getGetRecentChanges
tools.description:
getRecentChangesGet the recently changed pathways.
Note: the recent changes table only retains items for a limited time (2 months), so there is no guarantee that you will get all changes when the timestamp points to a date that is more than 2 months in the past.

tools.name: pathwayInformation.getGetPathwayInfo
tools.description: getPathwayInfoGet some general info about the pathway, such as the name, species, without downloading the GPML.

tools.name: search.getFindInteractions
tools.description: findInteractionsFind interactions defined in WikiPathways pathways.

tools.name: userManagement.getLogin
tools.description: loginStart a logged in session, using an existing WikiPathways account. This function will return an authentication code that can be used to excecute methods that need authentication (e.g. updatePathway).

tools.name: writeCreateUpdateDelete.getUpdatePathway
tools.description:
updatePathwayUpdate a pathway on the wiki with the given GPML code.
Note: To create/modify pathways via the web service, you need to have an account with web service write permissions. Please contact us to request write access for the web service.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
